race.comment: LAKEHURST (1) scored dominantly here two back when leading pillar-to-post. Followed up with a minor placing on turf at Gawler over this trip last time. Potter stays aboard with the claim. Expect them to burn across early from the wide draw and lead them up. GHAZNAVI (3) was always well out of his ground when missing the frame at Mudgee last start, a less impressive effort than his fifth at Muswellbrook the run before. Drops back in trip off a month-freshen and steps out in the new colours. Should find this a bit easier. OUR DIVINYL (2) improved nicely second-up at huge odds when leading them up at headquarters. Is open to further third-up and draws the A1. Can give this a big shake. SUPER SUNNY SEEYA (4) is desperate to break through soon and gets in well with the claim, though the draw will test him.
